expectations.text: Plan contains all 12 mandatory ExecPlan sections
expectations.evidence: Missing: Surprises & Discoveries, Decision Log, Outcomes & Retrospective, Idempotence and Recovery, Artifacts and Notes. Has Overview, Assumptions, Tasks, Non-Functional Considerations, Definition of Done instead.
No dedicated Progress section with checkboxes. Has a Definition of Done checklist at the end but it tracks acceptance criteria, not granular work steps.

expectations.text: Plan is self-contained with no external references
expectations.evidence: Mentions 'Source PRD' in the header but all necessary information is embedded. No 'refer to external docs'.

expectations.text: Plan uses concrete repository-relative file paths
Plan includes exact runnable shell commands
expectations.evidence: Includes npm run lint, npm test, npm run build, curl http://localhost:3000/health

expectations.text: Validation is phrased as observable behavior
expectations.evidence: States specific HTTP responses and JSON bodies expected from the endpoint

expectations.text: Technical terms are defined in plain language
expectations.evidence: Uses Router, mock, jest.Mock, supertest, pool without plain-language definitions. Assumes reader knows what these are.
